prompt: The video opens with three cyclists riding in a line along a paved road, set against a vast, open field under an overcast sky. The cyclists are dressed in athletic gear; the one on the left wears a red and black outfit, the middle cyclist sports a black and orange ensemble, while the one on the right is clad in all black. Each cyclist is pedaling their road bike, their shadows stretching long across the asphalt road due to the low angle of the sunlight. The background features a flat expanse of grassland, with a few scattered trees visible in the distance, suggesting a rural or countryside setting. The cyclists maintain a steady pace, their movements synchronized as they pedal along the road. The scene remains unchanged, with no new objects introduced, and the environment continues to be calm and serene, with no other vehicles or people in sight. By the final frame, the cyclists continue their journey, their shadows still prominent on the road, and the tranquil countryside backdrop remains constant.  A medium shot captures the cyclists from a side angle, emphasizing their synchronized pedaling and the expansive field behind them. The overcast sky adds a moody atmosphere to the scene, enhancing the sense of tranquility and focus.
